arts.ttl: Players who have played for Liverpool and RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to face RB Leipzig in the Champions League this evening looking to take another step towards the knockout rounds. Their opponents have emerged as Champions League regulars over the last decade, following Red Bull’s transformation of the German outfit. A philosophy of faith in youth and high-intensity football has seen Leipzig’s top talent […] The post Players who have played for Liverpool and RB Leipzig first appeared on The Football Faithful.
